description: Ručně spočtený golden dataset strike profilu (SPEC 4.6), w=0.5, spot=7595. 7590: call_vol = 40*0.6 = 24; call_oi = 0.5*100*0.6 = 30; put_vol = 10*0.4 = 4; put_oi = 0.5*200*0.4 = 40 → combined net = 54-44 = 10, vol net = 20, oiΔ net = -10. 7600: call_vol = 20*0.5 = 10; call_oi = 0.5*150*0.5 = 37.5; put_vol = 60*0.5 = 30; put_oi = 0.5*120*0.5 = 30 → combined net = 47.5-60 = -12.5, vol net = -20, oiΔ net = 7.5.
